meanings.dominoes.tile.0_0: The blank tile warns of disappointment, loss, or plans that come to nothing, urging caution and patience.
meanings.dominoes.tile.1_0: A solitary spot signals scandal, gossip, or trouble stirred by an unreliable acquaintance.
meanings.dominoes.tile.1_1: Harmony and affection prevail, promising a happy, settled relationship and contentment at home.
meanings.dominoes.tile.2_0: A pleasant journey or social outing lies ahead, though guard against careless spending.
meanings.dominoes.tile.2_1: Money matters look set to improve, with help arriving through a friend or new acquaintance.
meanings.dominoes.tile.2_2: Success and growth are favoured, bringing reward through partnership and shared effort.
meanings.dominoes.tile.3_0: Unexpected news or a sudden quarrel may unsettle you, so weigh your words with care.
meanings.dominoes.tile.3_1: Useful news or a clever idea arrives, though beware of indiscretion in love affairs.
meanings.dominoes.tile.3_2: Steady progress and caution serve you well, especially in money and property matters.
meanings.dominoes.tile.3_3: A change of fortune or circumstance is coming, often touching matters of the heart.
meanings.dominoes.tile.4_0: Disappointment or a minor setback is indicated, but it passes if you remain patient.
meanings.dominoes.tile.4_1: Debts may be cleared and financial worries eased, bringing welcome relief soon.
meanings.dominoes.tile.4_2: A change for the better is at hand, with money or good news arriving unexpectedly.
meanings.dominoes.tile.4_3: Domestic happiness and a stroke of good luck reward your steady efforts.
meanings.dominoes.tile.4_4: A time of festivity, celebration, and shared joy with friends or family approaches.
meanings.dominoes.tile.5_0: Offer comfort to another and take care, for an emotional or financial low may pass quickly.
meanings.dominoes.tile.5_1: A new love or social engagement brings excitement, though it may prove fleeting.
meanings.dominoes.tile.5_2: Patience is needed as plans mature slowly, yet a helpful visitor brings encouragement.
meanings.dominoes.tile.5_3: Welcome news and a peaceful interlude promise calm after recent troubles.
meanings.dominoes.tile.5_4: Financial gain is likely, though guard against rash decisions and overreaching.
meanings.dominoes.tile.5_5: Beneficial change and fresh opportunity arrive, especially in business or career.
meanings.dominoes.tile.6_0: A warning of loss or parting; old matters end, making way for something new.
meanings.dominoes.tile.6_1: A reconciliation, marriage, or happy reunion is foretold, mending past differences.
meanings.dominoes.tile.6_2: Good fortune and honest dealings bring success, especially through travel or trade.
meanings.dominoes.tile.6_3: A pleasant trip, gift, or generous gesture lifts your spirits and your prospects.
meanings.dominoes.tile.6_4: A favourable outcome in legal or business affairs rewards your perseverance.
meanings.dominoes.tile.6_5: Kindness offered or received brings comfort, and modest progress follows.
meanings.dominoes.tile.6_6: The highest tile promises great success, prosperity, and the fulfilment of your dearest wishes.
